note: The LIMITED natural-language seed for the comparative composer. Subjects name gnubg inputs in plain words (INPUT_DICTIONARY meanings); frames quantify over the fixed candidate list. The composer assembles sentence = frame(subject phrases); nothing outside this bank can be said.

frames.only_played: Of these five, only your move {worse_verb} -- the rest {better_verb}.
frames.best_alone: The best play alone {better_verb}; every other candidate, yours included, {worse_verb}.
frames.all_shown: All five candidates {shared_verb} -- the better ones pay for it elsewhere.
